labs.clinicalContext: SGLT2 inhibitors should not be initiated when eGFR <20 mL/min/1.73m² and should be discontinued when patient starts dialysis

labRequirements.specialPopulationNotes: Includes patients with eGFR <30 ml/min per 1.73 m2 or treated with dialysis for additional therapy considerations
labRequirements.sourceSnippet: SGLT2 inhibitor: Do not initiate when eGFR <20 mL/min/1.73m². Discontinue when patient starts dialysis.

governance.sourceDocument: KDIGO 2022 Clinical Practice Guideline for Diabetes Management in Chronic Kidney Disease
